texto: The aim of cleaning, then, should be to reduce bacteria numbers—but not to zero. Even harmful bacteria can be good for us when the immune system uses them for training. A couple of thousand Salmonella bacteria in the kitchen sink are a chance for our immune system to do a little sightseeing. They become dangerous only when they turn up in greater numbers. Bacteria get out of hand when they encounter the perfect conditions: a protected location that is warm and moist with a supply of delicious food.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Giulia Enders sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “The aim of cleaning, then, should be to reduce bacteria numbers—but not to zero. Even harmful bac…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, health, hygiene, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e hygiene.

A couple of thousand Salmonella bacteria in the kitchen sink are a chance for our immune system to do a little sightseeing. They become dangerous only when they turn up in greater numbers. Bacteria get out of hand when they encounter the perfect conditions: a protected location that is warm and moist with a supply of delicious food.

texto: Anyone who suffers from anxiety or depression should remember that an unhappy gut can be the cause of an unhappy mind. Sometimes, the gut has a perfect right to be unhappy, if it is dealing with an undetected food intolerance, for example. We should not always blame depression on the brain or on our life circumstances - there is much more to us than that.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Giulia Enders sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades.
